caption:
Three weeks ago this cabinet was where things went to die.

Open the door, hold your breath, hope you don't knock anything over. Sponges from a Costco run. Three half-empty bottles of the same cleaner. A measuring cup I lost track of in 2023.

I added a Simple Houseware 2-tier chrome sliding basket. Holds 18 lbs per shelf. Sets directly on the cabinet floor — no installation.

Now everything has a row. The system tells me when I'm out of something because the slot is empty, not buried.

Comment LINK and I'll reply with the link.
Amazon affiliate — I earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.

#amazonhomefinds #kitchenorganization #smallspacesolutions #undersinkstorage
